regulation_name: BPOM Regulation on Health Supplement Claims
citation: BPOM Regulation on Health Supplement Claims — Article 12
summary: Health supplement ads must use BPOM-permitted claims and must not imply disease treatment or prevention.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Nutraceutical, herbal, or vitamin health benefit claims. ACTION: WARN — verify against BPOM permitted claim list. CHECK: ML registration, label claims, and dosage. ESCALATE IF: Disease treatment or medicinal effect implied.
